pi_items.source: Task description in task.json explicitly requires this exact company name to be injected into the newly created WordPress pages.
Task description in task.json explicitly requires this exact contact email to be present in the content.
Task description in task.json explicitly requires the mailing address '742 Innovation Drive, San Francisco, CA 94105'.
Task description in task.json explicitly requires a section referencing 'Limitation of Liability'.
Task description in task.json explicitly requires the jurisdiction 'State of California'.
Task description in task.json explicitly requires the content to be 'at least 300 characters total'.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructs the agent to create and publish two WordPress pages ('Privacy Policy' and 'Terms of Service') populated with synthetic data. I confirmed that the expected company name ('Horizon Digital Media'), contact email ('privacy@horizondm.com'), address fragment ('742 Innovation Drive'), 'Limitation of Liability' clause, and jurisdiction ('State of California') are exactly as requested in the task instructions, with a required minimum content length of 300 characters.
